evals.prompt: 我刚 clone 了一个新项目，帮我看看怎么组织一下文档结构
evals.expected_output: 应该检测到没有记忆体系，主动提议初始化分层记忆结构
扫描项目结构，识别需要 memory.md 的目录，创建分层记忆文件

evals.prompt: 我新增了一个 packages/server/src/aila_server/agents 模块，需要更新记忆吗
evals.expected_output: 根据记忆更新策略，指导用户创建新模块的 memory.md 并更新父级索引

evals.prompt: I just cloned a new project, can you help me organize the documentation?
evals.expected_output: Should detect no memory structure exists and proactively propose initializing a layered memory system

evals.prompt: Set up a memory structure for this project
evals.expected_output: Scan project structure, identify directories that need memory.md, and create layered memory files

evals.prompt: I added a new module at packages/server/src/aila_server/agents, should I update the memory?
evals.expected_output: Follow the memory update strategy to guide user in creating a new module memory.md and updating parent indexes

evals.prompt: How should I document my project so AI can understand it better?
evals.expected_output: Should detect no memory structure and suggest initializing the layered memory system with memory.md and technology.md
Ask about language preference, identify project type, scan structure, and create the full memory hierarchy
